title: Aging Equipment [Discontinued]
description: Makes all of the tools have variants depending on what Durability level they're on.
body:
# Aging Equipmenet.
- Welcome to **Aging Equipment!** A modified Resource pack that makes every tool have a different texture based on what durability level it's currently on at the moment.

- The **Default textures** have **been modified** (taken from Enhanced Visuals) and moved to over here to give them a Smooth appearance and have a modern look. (some aren't finished due to it being in Beta still)

### Variant 1
![Netherite, Diamond, Gold, Iron.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2b9d8316ecddfcf51147fb4abff230dbe371539.png)

### Variant 2

![Stone, Wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/798fff84f01c19eef092eb90686f94215a553e37.png)
